findings.message: Workflow has no explicit top-level 'permissions' block. (C:\FeloniousApps\1main\remix_-the-yard\.github\workflows\ci.yml:1)
findings.remediation: Add 'permissions: read-all' (or narrower) so the GITHUB_TOKEN isn't broadly writable by default.
